introSection: Family Roller Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned by UK showman Wayne Smith. The ride has been on loan at Grinyland in France since July 2019.
fullText: Family Roller Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned by UK showman Wayne Smith. The ride has been on loan at Grinyland in France since July 2019.
